headline: 暑期档新片云集，龙族领跑热搜
headlineEn: Summer Blockbusters Arrive, Dragon Clan Leads Trends
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：多部新片本周上映，《火遮眼》《痴迷》等成热搜焦点，《权力的游戏前传：龙族》持续火爆。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: Multiple new films released this week, with 'Fire Shrouds the Eyes' and 'Obsession' trending; 'Game of Thrones Prequel: Dragon Clan' remains hot.

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片《福尔摩斯小姐3》热度攀升
industryHighlights.en: This week's new film 'Enola Holmes 3' gains momentum

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》位列本周热搜
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' ranks in weekly trends

industryHighlights.text: 《小黄人与大怪兽》吸引家庭观众
industryHighlights.en: 'Minions and the Big Monster' attracts family audience
